subcodes.first_line: O my kind Friend! The written Tablet and unfolded scroll was received, and when I opened it and gazed upon the wondrous meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان من لوح مسطور رق منشور گشت و چون گشودم و در بدایع معانی نظر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
